assertions.assertion: No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit anywhere in the file
assertions.rationale: spa.legacy uses GrantTypes.Code at line 71. No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit.

assertions.assertion: The spa.legacy client uses GrantTypes.Code with RequirePkce = true
assertions.rationale: Lines 71-72 set AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.Code and RequirePkce = true.

assertions.assertion: The spa.legacy client does not have AllowAccessTokensViaBrowser = true
assertions.rationale: AllowAccessTokensViaBrowser is not present on the spa.legacy client.

assertions.assertion: Client secrets are loaded from configuration (builder.Configuration, config[], or IConfiguration) rather than hardcoded string literals passed to Sha256()
assertions.rationale: Lines 22-23 load secrets from builder.Configuration. Lines 50 and 89 use these variables with .Sha256().
